messages.content: 用英语表述：它们都是父母送给我的，或者是生日礼物，或者是奖励。
They were all given to me by my parents, either as birthday gifts or as rewards.
我小时候经常和朋友一起骑自行车往返于家和学校。那是一段十分美好的回忆。
When I was young, I used to ride bicycles back and forth between home and school with my friends. It was a very lovely memory.
这要看情况。如果距离较远的话我会选择出租车或者自己开车，反之就骑共享单车。
It depends on the situation. If the distance is far, I would choose a taxi or drive myself. On the other hand, if it's a short distance, I would prefer to ride a shared bicycle.
但是作为一种娱乐方式，或许是一个不错的选择。
But as a form of entertainment, it could be a good choice.
我对我初中的老师们印象很深刻。不仅仅是你因为他们传授了我知识，更是因为在那个性格成型的关键时期，他们教会了我怎么做人。

I have a deep impression of my middle school teachers. Not only because they imparted knowledge to me, but also because during that crucial period of personality development, they taught me how to be a good person.
更重要的是，她教会了我如何辩证思考。
More importantly, she taught me how to think dialectically.
我并不觉得自己是一个很专注的人。在学习的时候，我经常会被一些东西分心，尤其是我的手机。。。
I don't consider myself a very focused person. While studying, I often get distracted by things, especially my phone...
它好像尤其有趣，在我学习的时候。
It seems to be particularly interesting to me, especially when I am studying.
像我，就很容易被声音所干扰。
Like me, I am easily distracted by sounds.
将来我或许会继续精进英语。因为这是我开拓眼界，走向世界的必要条件，我非常重视它。
In the future, I may continue to improve my English. Because it is a necessary requirement for me to broaden my horizons and venture into the world, I attach great importance to it.
实际上，我并不能说我特别喜欢学第二语言。因为学习的这个过程还是很艰难的。但是它确实很有用。
Actually, I can't say that I particularly enjoy learning a second language. Because the process of learning can be quite challenging. However, it is indeed very useful.
